titleStmt.title: SII 27.142: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 142. (A.R. No. 519 of 1928-29.) HACHAVEṬṬU, KARKALA TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in a field called Kallagaṇḍa.

This record is dated Śaka 1326, Tāraṇa, Makara 6, Thursday, solar eclipse. These details correspond to 1406 A.D., January 1. But this date is very early for Virūpāksha. If the Śaka year is a mistake for 1386, then the date falls in the reign period of this king, the tithi corresponding to 1465 A.D., January 1, when the weekday was Tuesday. No eclipse occurred on that day. In the next year (1406 A.D., Pārthiva) the tithi occurred on January 2, Thursday, though even on that date the said eclipse did not occur. The latter might be the intended date.
It registers a gift of land to Mahādēva of Yiṭṭala, for worship, burning a perpetual lamp and feeding 36 brāhmaṇas daily in the month of Siṁha, by Kānteṇa Mārāḷuva alias Koṁṇa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakavaruṣa 1326
svastiśrī namastuṁga siraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cā
ravē . trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhuvē .
śrī manu mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra virūpākṣarāya
ru rājyava pratipālisuva tāraṇa saṁvatsarada makaramāsa Ā
raneya guruvārada sūryyagrahaṇada vuṁṇyakāladalu kāṁteṇa mā
rāḷuvarāda koṁṇaru dharmmārthakāma mōkṣa siddhyarththavāgi dēvarigu brāhmari
gu māḍida dharmada kramaveṁteṁdaḍe yiṭalada bayaloḷege koḷake yeṁ
ba gaddeyiṁda kiḷagedirillāveṁbayala gaddegaḷu bittuva ṭhāu yi
ta Āyaru ḍi kuṁmariyeṁba bayaloḷage bittuvagadde nālku
yaḷu mūḍe Aṁtu mūvatayeraḍu mūḍegaddeyanu yiṭṭilada śrīma
hādēvarige dinaprati voppāne Ukkudati Ākkiya nivēdyavanu naḍasuvaru
sihvamāsakke brāhmaṇa bhōjana muvatāṟu maṁdi brāhmarige dinaṁ pra
ti siṁhamāsadalu sāvirada hadinākku maṁdige brāhmaṇa
rige naḍasuUdu bēkāda mēlu veccavanu yi bhūmiyiṁ
dave naḍasūdu yiṭṭala dēvarige voṁdu naṁdābeḷakanu māṭarāḍi
ya Ātrapāḍiya mūladiṁdalu naḍasuvanu yi dharṁmagaḷanu
Ācaṁdrārkasthāyiyāgi naḍasuvaru yi dharṁmake Ārobbaru
tappi Aḷipidare vāraṇāsiyalu yeḷunūru kavileya
vadhisida dōṣa yi sāvirada hadinālku maṁdi brāhmara vāra
ṇāsiyalu koṁdavaru taṁma mātā pitrugaḷanu narakadali
kiddavaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harētu vasuṁdarā . ṣaṣṭirvva
ruṣa sahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatēkrimi .
dānapālanayōrmadhyēdānātśrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānāśorggama
vāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī
The two lines are badly
Digital edition of SII 27.142 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
